commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And the children of Israel were numbered, and were all present, and went against them: and the children of Israel encamped before them like two little flocks of kids; but the Syrians filled the country. Hebrew also, "they were all present. "Chaldean, "ready. "Syriac, "in battle array. They were comparatively so contemptible, ver. (Haydock) At the same time, Josaphat could muster above a million warriors; for piety makes kingdoms prosper.
